author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Fix #604 (mode #4): switch apply_write_set's JSON write from std::fs::write to crate::utils::atomic_write (temp file + POSIX rename). Closes the only non-self-healing failure mode the issue's table enumerates (process crash mid-write leaving a half-populated file on disk). Modes #1, #3, #5 self-heal on next successful mutation; mode #2 was already accepted as eventually consistent. Inline doc-comment on mutations.rs explains the three-store consistency model and why we declined the larger event-sourcing restructure. Full diagnosis posted as GH#604 comment. Tests: 2878 pass. Clippy -D warnings -W unwrap_used -W expect_used clean. Fmt clean.
